name: Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/week tool
description: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/week, manual data extraction causes delayed insights. We automate weekly sales pipeline data extracts instead of manual data extraction and analysis using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to quickly access and analyze sales pipeline data for decision-making.
features: Export options for CSV and Excel formats

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to quickly access and analyze sales pipeline data for decision-making.

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual data extraction and analysis using spreadsheets.
must_have_features: Export options for CSV and Excel formats
